productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Rey charcoal Casual Shoe
description: The inspiration for buckaroo shoes lies in the Mexican plains. This brand makes shoes in high quality leather to please every alpha male's fashion fantasy. Rugged and high fashion on the outside, this buckaroo men Rey Black Casual ankle-high shoe pays tribute to the miners' lifestyle from a bygone era with the riveted nubuck overlays. Upper Made of full grain leather upper with nubuck overlays on the heel and midfoot Lace-up system for a customised Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Rivets securing the overlays in the heel and midfoot region Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Haul loop at the collar to hang shoes from a backpack Midsole Phylon midsole with faux greased PU foxing Outsole Waffle patterened TPR outsole for enhanced grip and traction Shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
